description_long: This house is a two-story brick residential building with a complex, multi-gabled roof and several chimneys, set within a landscaped plot featuring a curved driveway and mature deciduous trees. The main structure has a prominent garage attached to one side and a covered porch or carport on the other, both with sloped roofs. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with a mix of large and small panes, and the main entryway is accessed via a short set of steps leading to a modest porch. The brickwork is complemented by light-colored trim around the windows and roof edges, giving the house a traditional yet slightly eclectic appearance. The surrounding environment includes a paved road, grassy lawn, and a retaining wall, suggesting a suburban or semi-urban context. The overall setting is peaceful, with the house positioned as the focal point among trees and open space.
description: A two-story brick house with a multi-gabled roof, attached garage, and covered porch, surrounded by trees and a curved driveway in a landscaped suburban setting.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the front entry, garage, and covered porch, with the driveway and trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the side, partially obscured by trees, with the driveway curving toward the main entrance and the garage less visible.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, revealing the back of the garage, additional roof details, and more of the surrounding lawn and trees.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a clear look at the garage, covered porch, and the main road leading up to the house, with the front facade and entryway in full view.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a modest overhang, flanked by windows and adjacent to a covered carport.
